creator: kestel@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 185145
New version of diff with CHEESESHOP repo and tests

Hello Kubilay, thanks for you reply.

I made some changes in Makefile:
1. change repo type to CHEESESHOP.
2. Add TEST_DEPENDS
3. Add TEST_TARGET and do-test section, but with test make failed. 

Poudriere tells next:
